detectors.description:
BIRTHDAY_GIFT_1_ETH.GetGift() (BIRTHDAY_GIFT_1_ETH.sol#67-83) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- reciver == msg.sender && now > unlockTime (BIRTHDAY_GIFT_1_ETH.sol#75)
